route_strategy.reasoning: Reusing `/login` is the least disruptive approach as it already contains the gate logic to redirect authenticated users. The `/pages/Login.jsx` will act as a wrapper combining all the new modular components.

typography.font_family: Poppins (assume set as primary sans font)
typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-slate-900 leading-[1.1]

visual_effects.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md on hover

components_structure.name: Header
components_structure.layout_rules: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-slate-200. Flex-between.
components_structure.content: Left: Brand icon + 'Design Workshop'. Right: 'Sign in' Button (`variant='default'`, brand color).

components_structure.name: Hero
components_structure.layout_rules: Generous top padding (`pt-40 pb-24`). Left-aligned or centered content block with the background grid and radial glow behind it.
components_structure.content: Overline: 'ZAIBATSUI LABS'. H1: 'Build e-commerce pages without the bloat.' Subtitle: 'A hybrid page builder providing self-contained HTML/CSS/JS snippets that drop into any Nettailer CMS without runtime dependencies.' CTAs: Primary 'Sign in with Google' (`data-testid='login-google'`), Secondary 'See how it works' (scroll to HowItWorks).

components_structure.name: ValueProps
components_structure.layout_rules: CSS Grid: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4`. Cards have `bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8`.
components_structure.content: Cards: 1. WYSIWYG Section Editor, 2. Hybrid Page Builder, 3. Built-in Brand Kit, 4. No-Dependency Snippets. Use Lucide icons (e.g., Code, Layout, Palette, Blocks) colored in `#E01839`.

components_structure.name: SectionsShowcase
components_structure.layout_rules: Bento or uniform grid (`grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4`). Darker or slightly tinted section background (`bg-slate-50`) to contrast.
components_structure.content: Tiles: Hero, Content, Products, Insights Grid, Resources, Logos, Break banner, Tabs, Rich-text. Each tile has a small icon, name, and 1-line description. Hover effect: slight translate-y and border color change.

components_structure.name: HowItWorks
components_structure.layout_rules: Horizontal flex on desktop, vertical on mobile. Steps separated by chevrons or lines.
components_structure.content: Step 1: Sign in. Step 2: Build & autosave. Step 3: Copy snippet, paste into CMS.

components_structure.name: Testimonial
components_structure.layout_rules: A solid dark block (`bg-slate-900 text-white`) or bordered block. Left side text, right side author.
components_structure.content: Text: 'Design Workshop produces clean, runtime-free HTML we can drop straight into our Nettailer platforms. No dependencies, no slow loading.' Author: 'Lars, E-commerce Tech Lead'.

components_structure.name: FAQ
components_structure.layout_rules: Max-width 3xl container, centered. Use standard accessible accordion structure.
components_structure.content: Questions: 1. Do I need to install anything? 2. Is my code mine? 3. Will it slow my site? 4. Do I need to know HTML? 5. Can multiple sections coexist on one page? 6. Is there a free tier?

components_structure.name: FooterCTA
components_structure.description: Final CTA bar and simple footer links.
components_structure.content: H2: 'Start building your library'. CTA: 'Sign in with Google' (`data-testid='login-google-footer'`). Small copyright text below.

technical_instructions.auth: Must import `useAuth` from `../../auth/AuthContext` and attach `startLogin` to the click handlers of the CTAs.
technical_instructions.testing: Ensure all `data-testid` attributes are present. Specifically, `data-testid='login-google'` MUST be on the primary hero button and header button.
technical_instructions.components: Use pure Tailwind + HTML for layout wrappers. If using Shadcn (e.g. Accordion for FAQ, Button for CTAs), import from `@/components/ui/` or `../../components/ui/`.
